demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged-care facility, nursing staff on site

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I scratched my legs until they bled because they were so dry and itchy, and now the sores are burning and leaking yellow fluid. (Reported by the patient with the facility nurse on the call.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nurse says his legs have been terribly itchy and dry for ages, but over the last week he has scratched them raw and now the sores are painful and weeping yellow fluid, so they rang after hours.

symptom_narrative.onset: the itching has been going on for a few months; the painful weeping sores on the shins came on over the past week and got worse today
symptom_narrative.duration: months of itch; about a week of broken skin, acutely painful today
symptom_narrative.character: intense all-over itching with very dry, rough, scaly, finely cracked skin; now deep scratch sores on both shins that are sore, burning and leaking golden-yellow fluid
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is unbearable and stops him sleeping; the leg pain today is what has him most distressed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: itch is all over; the painful weeping sores are on the front of both lower legs, with some itchy lumps on the forearms from picking
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: itch is constant and worse at night; the leg sores have been getting worse over the week
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; the emollient he uses now and then hasn't stopped the dryness
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feels a bit warm today; badly disrupted sleep from the itch
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: long-standing dry, itchy skin that has been getting worse; no prior wound infections mentioned
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: mobilises independently around the facility but is highly distressed by the leg pain and poor sleep

past_medical_history.how_managed: uses a simple moisturiser now and then

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged-care facility; nursing staff assist with care and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: 37.4 degrees, taken by the facility nurse
88 beats per minute per the facility nurse

both shins have deep scratch sores with yellowish crusts and some weeping yellow fluid; the skin around the sores looks a bit red and feels warm; skin generally very dry and flaky; some itchy lumps on the forearms
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay/nurse description over video; wound depth, spread and infection severity cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: nurse reports his fingernails are long, jagged and dirty; he keeps reaching down to rub his lower legs
